prompt: Create a premium 1:1 ultra-stylish fashion collage advertisement featuring the same young handsome bearded male model across multiple cinematic portrait styles inside one single high-end composition. The model should have sharp jawline, textured beard, messy stylish hair, attractive confident expression, modern masculine aura, and luxury Gen-Z street fashion styling. Entire mood should feel bold, dark, mysterious, and visually addictive — designed for viral social media aesthetics. Theme: midnight luxury + underground streetwear + cinematic masculine energy. Include: – one intense cinematic close-up portrait with moody side lighting – one stylish rooftop streetwear pose at night overlooking neon city lights – one candid walking shot wearing oversized fashion layers and headphones – one luxury editorial studio portrait with dramatic shadows – one casual mirror selfie frame with relaxed Gen-Z attitude Outfits should include layered streetwear, oversized hoodies, leather jackets, silver chains, rings, watches, black cargo pants, premium sneakers, sunglasses, and luxury accessories. Keep the same character identity in every frame. Use a rich color palette of matte black, charcoal gray, deep emerald, cold silver, dark navy, smoky teal, and subtle warm skin highlights instead of bright colorful tones. Design the layout like an expensive modern fashion magazine mixed with underground music album aesthetics. Use asymmetrical collage composition, overlapping frames, ripped paper textures, glossy reflections, motion blur streaks, cinematic grain, magazine cutout effects, shadow overlays, luxury fashion graphics, subtle chrome textures, and layered editorial design. Typography should be very tiny, minimal, and aesthetic — almost hidden naturally inside the artwork. Add micro-text details like: “midnight youth” “no signal” “after hours” “lost generation” “urban soul” “02:17 AM” “offline mode” Use cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-fashion photography aesthetics, dark luxury atmosphere, professional editorial color grading, ultra realistic details, visually rich composition, premium Instagram/Twitter fashion campaign energy, ultra detailed masterpiece.
